steps.title: Start with slope-intercept form
steps.content:
A line with slope $\frac{1}{8}$ has the form
$$y=\frac{1}{8}x+b.$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content:
The equation is
$$y=\frac{x}{8}-11.$$
A quick check confirms it: when $x=40$, $y=5-11=-6$, which is the given point. This matches choice B.
